nodes.label: AI for administrative and repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for core creative and fulfilling tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It's the more administrative and repetitive things that I want to push to AI

nodes.label: AI as supportive tool for efficiency and consistency
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement or threat to human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: AI is definitely a supportive tool for us, not something that is taking over

nodes.label: AI reliability in low-impact tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI risk in high-impact client care
nodes.grounding_span: there is nothing that AI can mess up that will negatively impact the care our clients get

nodes.label: AI as client support after hours
nodes.label_negative: AI replacing human touch in client care
nodes.grounding_span: it was after business hours and they felt uncomfortable calling their nutritionist directly

nodes.label: Professional fulfillment and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I really love the goal-setting and nutritional planning sides of my job, so I would not want to delegate them

nodes.label: Efficiency and consistency in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I think it provides some consistency and definitely efficiency

nodes.label: Client well-being and support
nodes.grounding_span: it settled her down and gave her easy to follow instructions

nodes.label: Satisfaction with current AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I am very satisfied with where we are at right now

nodes.label: Pride in AI helping a client in distress
nodes.grounding_span: she was near a breakdown until she talked to the AI, but it settled her down

nodes.label: Confidence in AI for low-impact tasks
nodes.grounding_span: there is nothing that AI can mess up that will negatively impact the care our clients get

nodes.label: Task boundary setting — clear delineation between AI-appropriate and human-essential tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would not want to delegate them. It's the more administrative and repetitive things that I want to push to AI

nodes.label: Iterative refinement for high-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: There is definitely back and forth on performance reviews because they are so important
